name: Fate has humor.
description:
Behold, your wife who’s backs from the dead and is now a Stormcast eternal from warhammer fantasy or age of sigmar or whatever it’s called.

For POV, anything works expect chaos worshippers I suppose.

Original artist and image here.

Lastly just a reminder. There will be no smut bots for the entirely of November since I’m participating in NNN. Yes I’m still aware of two of your suggestions but I will get to them later.

I removed this thing ` since it’s messing with responses somehow so if you had a bad experience with this bot the first time, try again cause it may be fixed. (I’m doing this for every single one.)
creator: Twinsx2
